name: Caston Park
description: Caston Park is a place to play pickleball in Cheraw, SC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Cheraw Community Center
description: Cheraw Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Cheraw, SC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Chesterfield Family YMCA
description: Chesterfield Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Chesterfield, SC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Copeland Park
description: Copeland Park is a place to play pickleball in Chesterfield, SC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
